zone_name: Jrel Frontier Settlement - Mt. M'chel Region

669.name: Bottom of the Old Well
669.description: Rubble is strewn about the floor of this small cavern. The limestone walls acted as a natural filter for groundwater to percolate through, but the underground spring that fed the well has been dry for quite some time.

u.to_zone: Jrel Frontier Settlement - Mt. M'chel Region

657.name: Near the Settlement
657.description: You stand just outside a small frontier settlement hidden in the northern coastal foothills. A small clearing, fenced in on three sides by the rising mountain terrain is perfectly suited to cradle the budding community.

n.to_zone: Jrel Frontier Settlement - Mt. M'chel Region

npcs.name: Haggard sentry
npcs.description: approach, but you would never have made it that close without notice if he

658.name: Below the Watch Tower
658.description: A fifty foot watch tower sits just inside town, with a clear view of the only safe approach to the settlement. It seems to be carved from a pillar of solid stone jutting from the ground in the centre of the clearing. The small village stretches out in all directions except south, where a path leads out of town.

e.to_zone: Jrel Frontier Settlement - Mt. M'chel Region

w.to_zone: Jrel Frontier Settlement - Mt. M'chel Region

u.to_zone: Jrel Frontier Settlement - Mt. M'chel Region

npcs.name: Member of the militia
npcs.description: This man does not have the look of a warrior, and he's ill

660.name: Well Trod Path
660.description: This leaf strewn path connects the western side of town to the central hub of the watch tower, which provides quick safety and shelter as well as acting like a sort of town square.

e.to_zone: Jrel Frontier Settlement - Mt. M'chel Region

w.to_zone: Jrel Frontier Settlement - Mt. M'chel Region

661.name: Cluster of Buildings
661.description: Three buildings are nestled against the rising cliff on the western side of the clearing. The rhythmic pounding of hammer on metal comes from the hut directly to your north, while to the west children frolic outside a large structure built right into the cliff.

e.to_zone: Jrel Frontier Settlement - Mt. M'chel Region

n.to_zone: Jrel Frontier Settlement - Mt. M'chel Region

s.to_zone: Jrel Frontier Settlement - Mt. M'chel Region

w.to_zone: Jrel Frontier Settlement - Mt. M'chel Region

s.to_zone: Jrel Frontier Settlement - Mt. M'chel Region

npcs.name: John Smith
npcs.description: ogre seems unphased by his slavery, and sings merrily the day away.

663.name: Within a Small Cabin
663.description: Nothing more than the bare necessities here, a cook stove and a bed lined with straw dominate the room, and a table set for two is pushed into one corner. Various cooking utensils hang from pegs on the wall alongside the tools of a cobbler. A pile of old shoes lay waiting for repair.

n.to_zone: Jrel Frontier Settlement - Mt. M'chel Region

npcs.name: Skjelholm
npcs.description: broad shouldered with striking blue eyes and an unruly mane of dirty blonde

664.name: Outside the School
664.description: The schoolyard was once the site of a small rockslide, and after clearing away much of the debris, several of the larger boulders were carved into miniature castles and various other objects for the children to climb up, and of course, fall off. But hey, they're young - they bounce.

s.to_zone: Jrel Frontier Settlement - Mt. M'chel Region

npcs.name: Brash child
npcs.description: and leaves, his face is smudged with dirt, and his hands are covered in something sticky.  Clearly, he's having a good day.

665.name: Inside a Small Classroom
665.description: A dozen unruly children sit behind their desks practicing arithmetic in this small schoolhouse. Three of the walls are built out of logs like the rest of the village, but they are butted up against the rock of the cliff to form the fourth wall.

n.to_zone: Jrel Frontier Settlement - Mt. M'chel Region

npcs.name: Professor Fredriks
npcs.description: tell by his expression he didnt want to be out here in the first place. Why he came is a mystery, but he does resemble a wanted poster you saw

666.name: Gravel Path
666.description: This gravel road leads between the watchtower and a cluster of homes on the eastern side of town. One large building stands taller than the rest likely the home of the village headman.

n.to_zone: Jrel Frontier Settlement - Mt. M'chel Region

ne.to_zone: Jrel Frontier Settlement - Mt. M'chel Region

667.name: Clearing of Homes
667.description: Several nondescript huts are erected in a semicircle on either side of a large stone building. Nothing catches your attention about any of the small homes, but if you were looking for someone in charge, the stone house would be your best bet. The power of the ocean gradually subsides.

e.to_zone: Jrel Frontier Settlement - Mt. M'chel Region

n.to_zone: Jrel Frontier Settlement - Mt. M'chel Region

sw.to_zone: Jrel Frontier Settlement - Mt. M'chel Region

668.name: The Old Well
668.description: Long dry and crumbling away, the old well is really little more than a hole in the ground ringed by stones. The weeds grow high in this area and the path is almost completely gone, as if the townspeople avoided this place altogether.

s.to_zone: Jrel Frontier Settlement - Mt. M'chel Region

d.to_zone: Jrel Frontier Settlement - Mt. M'chel Region

670.name: Meeting Hall
670.description: The large foyer of this building doubles as a town hall. A huge table with more than enough room for all the citizens of the small hamlet fills most of the room. A giant stone hearth covers the north wall, decorated with a mosaic of gold flecked granite. The roaring fire heats the room to a comfortable degree and the skins of various animals stretched out on the floor give it a very welcome atmosphere.

e.to_zone: Jrel Frontier Settlement - Mt. M'chel Region

s.to_zone: Jrel Frontier Settlement - Mt. M'chel Region

w.to_zone: Jrel Frontier Settlement - Mt. M'chel Region

npcs.name: Headman's wife
npcs.description: You're not supposed to judge a book by its cover, but you can just tell she's a horrible shrew of a woman. She glares at you nastily from under her

671.name: Headmans Room
671.description: The room's furnishings are sparse, little more than two plush chairs for private meetings, and a large bed for... other private meetings. A rug made from the skin of a huge white bear covers the floor, its glass eyes still managing to appear fearsome in the glow of a small fireplace.

w.to_zone: Jrel Frontier Settlement - Mt. M'chel Region

672.name: Noisy Kitchen
672.description: Pots and pans crash and clang together like a percussion section, while various kettles and boiling pots hiss an off key tune. A staccato beat of chopping cleavers and sizzling oil accompanies the cacophony of cooking noise. A wonderful smell reminds you of meals mom used to fix for you.

n.to_zone: Jrel Frontier Settlement - Mt. M'chel Region

npcs.name: Fat chef
npcs.description: fairly good at preparing it too, which is why he's the chef.  He gobbles down nearly as much as he prepares, so he can't be too displeased with his

673.name: Worn Trail
673.description: This path meanders north and south, between the tall watchtower, and the large hill bordering the north end of town. In the distance you see the thin path wind its way up the hill and stop at an impassable shelf of stone.

n.to_zone: Jrel Frontier Settlement - Mt. M'chel Region

674.name: Between Two Homes
674.description: Two cozy looking cabins on either side of you share the same yard. A large fire pit and two picnic tables fill much of the area between the houses, the rest is open space, littered with miniature wooden swords, makeshift shields, and various other childrens toys.

e.to_zone: Jrel Frontier Settlement - Mt. M'chel Region

n.to_zone: Jrel Frontier Settlement - Mt. M'chel Region

npcs.name: Mastiff pup
npcs.description: from his oversized paws and playful demeanor that he's still just a puppy.

675.name: A Gristly Sight
675.description: What was once a cozy home is now a gruesome bloodbath. All the furniture is smashed beyond recognition and personal effects are stomped into the dirt. Blood and gore covers everything - splattered on the walls scrawled into strange patterns and messages. Just inside the doorway, you feel several drops of something sticky fall down onto your head.

e.to_zone: Jrel Frontier Settlement - Mt. M'chel Region

676.name: Home Sweet Home
676.description: The sign above the mantle seems quite ironic given the air of sadness that pervades the home. Several children, who should probably be in school stare blankly at the small fire. A bereft woman goes about tidying the already clean cabin with neurotic fervor.

w.to_zone: Jrel Frontier Settlement - Mt. M'chel Region

npcs.name: Weeping man
npcs.description: ever know, his young mind was simply unable to cope.  But broken men with no will to live are capable of all manner of things, and best kept at arms

677.name: Northern Barrier
677.description: A low stone wall has been erected at the bottom of the large hill closing off the north end of the vale. Less than three feet high, and with a wide gap to accommodate the path leading up the hill, it is more a psychological barrier than any real defense.

n.to_zone: Jrel Frontier Settlement - Mt. M'chel Region

npcs.name: Ridgeback
npcs.description: the top of its head.  It has no tusks to speak of,  but the serrated bone plate on the end of its snout is an adequate substitute.

678.name: Outside a Small Town
678.description: Just to your south is a tiny frontier settlement. Hidden from view until you're nearly upon it, it sits in a well protected vale surrounded on three sides by cliffs and large foothills. The open end is far to your south, while one of the foothills rises steeply to the north.

u.to_zone: Foothills of Mt. Mchel - Mt. M'chel Region

659.name: Watch Tower
659.description: The room at the top of this tower is perfectly square in shape, and the walls are smooth as glass, as though they had been melted out of the living rock. The single window provides a clear view of the approach to town, enemies would be spotted before they even knew the village existed.

d.to_zone: Jrel Frontier Settlement - Mt. M'chel Region

npcs.name: Watcher
npcs.description: acknowledges your presence.  His left ear is torn away and he is missing an eye on the same side.  The wound that mars his face is still fresh.
